titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-Karim Ibn Amr

text: و ما كان فيه عن عبد الكريم بن عمرو فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن أبي نصر البزنطيّ، عن عبد الكريم بن عمرو الخثعميّ و لقبه كرّام‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abd Al-Karim ibn Amr has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Nasr Al-Bazanti, from Abd Al-Karim ibn Amr Al-Khathami, whose title was Karram.
